# Damman Formation

**Summary**: A sedimentary formation in the Dammam Dome.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] investigated the Dammam Formation to identify fault zones and deformed areas.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation is subdivided into five members: Midra Shale, Saila Shale, Alveolina Limestone, Khobar limestone member, and Alat dolomitic limestone/marl member. ([[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023, p. 66]])
